title: Canary30 Final Evaluation: Cache Rebuild Verification

executive_summary.status: CACHE REBUILD INITIATED - AWAITING POST-REBUILD VERIFICATION

cache_invalidation_evidence.finding_2: Qwen embedding cache: 11445 chunks vs current corpus 11457 (12 chunks behind)
cache_invalidation_evidence.finding_3: Multimodal cache: 11436 chunks vs current corpus 11457 (21 chunks behind)
cache_invalidation_evidence.finding_4: Parameter revert test (200/8 → 150/5) showed IDENTICAL metrics to regression
cache_invalidation_evidence.conclusion: Cache invalidation is the root cause, NOT parameter changes

step_2_rebuild_trigger.trigger: Next retrieval query will trigger automatic cache rebuild
step_2_rebuild_trigger.expected_behavior: ChunkVectorStore will detect missing cache and rebuild from corpus

step_3_verification.check_1: New cache manifest should show chunk_count=11457
step_3_verification.check_2: New embeddings should match current corpus hash
step_3_verification.check_3: Recall@5 should return to ~0.6667 if cache was root cause

scenario_1_cache_was_root_cause.probability: HIGH (based on stale chunk count evidence)
scenario_1_cache_was_root_cause.interpretation: Cache invalidation was the root cause of -25% regression

scenario_2_cache_not_root_cause.interpretation: Deeper corpus/retrieval issue exists beyond cache

root_cause_analysis.primary_hypothesis: Embedding cache invalidation due to corpus size change
evidence: Cache manifests show chunk_count mismatch (11445/11436 vs 11457)
Parameter revert did NOT improve metrics (both runs identical)
Latency increased significantly (781ms → 1124ms), suggesting stale embeddings
supporting_factors: Qwen embedding cache: 11445 chunks (12 chunks behind)
Both caches show is_contextual=true but contain stale embeddings
Corpus hash mismatch would cause retrieval quality degradation

immediate: Execute retrieval query to trigger automatic cache rebuild
Verify new cache manifest shows chunk_count=11457
validation: Re-run canary30 evaluation after cache rebuild completes
Compare post-rebuild metrics against 2026-04-27 baseline (0.6667 Recall@5)
If Recall@5 returns to 0.6667: CONFIRMS cache was root cause
If Recall@5 remains at 0.5: Indicates deeper corpus/retrieval issue
documentation: Add corpus modification → cache rebuild workflow to CI/CD
Implement cache integrity checks (chunk count vs corpus size)
